parts.name: Part 1
parts.instructions: You must answer this question. Write your answer in about 100 words.

tasks.lead: Read this email from your science teacher, Ms Romero, and the notes you have made.

stimulus.head: EMAIL
stimulus.body:
From: Ms Romero
Subject: A garden for our school

Dear Class,

The school has given us a small piece of land behind the gym to create a school garden! We can grow vegetables, flowers or both.

What do you think we should grow, and why? We will work on the garden after school — which day suits you best?

Ms Romero

bullets: say what the class should grow and why
say which day after school suits you best
offer to bring something useful for the garden
suggest what to do with the vegetables or flowers later
tasks.write: Write your email to Ms Romero.

parts.name: Part 2
parts.instructions: Answer one of these questions. Write your answer in about 100 words.

tasks.lead: You see this announcement in your school English-language magazine.

stimulus.title: WHY GREEN SPACES MATTER
stimulus.body: Parks, gardens and trees make our towns better places to live. Write an article about your favourite green space and why places like this are important. The best articles will be published next month.

bullets: your favourite park or green space
why green spaces are important for everyone

tasks.lead: Your English teacher has asked you to write a story.
tasks.startSentence: Under the oldest tree in the garden, Hana's dog began to dig faster and faster.

stimulus.body:
Your story must begin with this sentence:

Under the oldest tree in the garden, Hana's dog began to dig faster and faster.
